---
title: "Sir Thomas Dyke Acland 11th Bt."
---

## Sir Thomas Dyke Acland 11th Bt.

**Dates:** (1809-1898)

### Description

politician and educationist, father of Agnes (Acland) Anson and brother of Arthur Acland Troyte and Sir Henry Wentworth Acland

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
